case_title: RIVERWALK HOLDINGS, LTD VS. WARREN CASSELL et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-24-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
